ablation_row_policy: compare on common eligible rows where scientifically appropriate; also report available-row + coverage effect + rejection reasons

calibration.policy: fit only on prior-completed folds' out-of-fold predictions; never on the evaluated fold
calibration.reject_if: log loss / Brier / stability materially worsen even when ECE improves

chronology_and_folds.diagnostic_folds_allowed: earlier seasons for stability only; may not replace promotion folds
chronology_and_folds.method: chronological walk-forward, immutable folds, identical target+availability rules per fold

deterministic_replay.score_identity: byte-identical evaluation content excluding code_commit/wall-clock provenance stamps

identity_method: sha256(canonical_json_bytes(value)); canonical = sort_keys, compact separators, trailing newline

join.grain: one row per game_pk (home + away side features combined)
join.side_alignment: join pitcher/team/context per (game_pk, side) then pivot away_/home_ prefix; 22761 game rows from 45522 side rows
join.strict_prior: every joined feature is a strict-prior snapshot (prior games only, label_available_at <= cutoff, target excluded)

metrics.comparison: paired on identical games; official-date clustered bootstrap 95% intervals; effect sizes reported

model_candidates.name: spline_gam_logistic
model_candidates.note: logistic on natural-cubic-spline bases of continuous features; fixed knots; deterministic

prediction_cutoff_policy: per-game frozen prediction_cutoff from docs/multiseason_2015_2024/features.jsonl; features must satisfy availability <= cutoff, target game excluded

preprocessing.missing: median-impute on training fold + explicit missingness indicator columns; never target-informed
preprocessing.monotonic_constraints: none asserted in v2 baseline (documented for future)
preprocessing.scaling: standardize continuous features on training fold only; persist mean/std

prohibited_data: market/closing odds in training or promotion
final umpire identity without pregame timing
collector observation time treated as source publication time

all_required: improvement vs designated baseline strictly positive on EVERY promotion fold

team.null_semantics: missing -> NaN + team missingness; team_context_feature_eligible gates

pitcher.identity_basis: POSTGAME_ACTUAL_STARTER_ATTRIBUTION (features are strict-prior; label attribution only)

target_and_schedule.role: target label + frozen prediction cutoffs + schedule geometry source

target.definition: NRFI=1 when zero runs are scored in the complete first inning (top+bottom); YRFI=1 otherwise

edge_cases.doubleheader: each game_pk graded independently; game_number preserved
edge_cases.label_after_grading_time: handled by strict-prior availability; never used as a feature
edge_cases.neutral_site_relocated: included; venue taken from normalized venue_id; park eligibility may drop
edge_cases.suspended_resumed: included only if first inning completed before suspension and label available; else EXCLUDED reason FIRST_INNING_INCOMPLETE

target.name: first_inning_no_run

timezone_policy: venue standard-time UTC offsets only (no DST/tzdata) for day/night + tz movement; all timestamps stored UTC
uncertainty_method: official-date cluster bootstrap (>=2000 replicates) for scores; model-uncertainty replicates for tree variance
